title: General Aptitude_ Quantitative Aptitude - Clock Time

questions.question:
A person went out between \( 4 \)pm and \( 5 \)pm to chat with her friend and returned between \( 5 \)pm and \( 6 \)pm. On her return, she found that the hour-hand and the minute-hand of her (well-functioning) clock had just exchanged their positions with respect to their earlier positions at the time of her leaving. The person must have gone out to chat at



TIFR CSE 2014 | Part A | Question: 10

The hour needle of a clock is malfunctioning and travels in the anti-clockwise direction, i.e., opposite to the usual direction, at the same speed it would have if it was working correctly. The minute needle is working correctly. Suppose the two needles show the correct time at \( 12 \) noon, thus both needles are together at the \( 12 \) mark. After how much time do the two needles meet again?



TIFR CSE 2020 | Part A | Question: 12

A clock shows \( 3:00 \).  After \( 10^{1024} \) minutes, what minute does the minute hand point to?



TIFR CSE 2025 | Part A | Question: 10
